summary: Iter17 — cancel-with-fee (3 statuses) + no-show endpoints. Backend 13/13 PASS via pytest. Frontend testid contract reviewed in code: bd-cancel (aktif), bd-cancel-pending (booking_pending), bd-cancel-refund + bd-no-show (booking_paid), room-cancel-N quick X — all correctly conditioned in Dashboard.jsx and call POST /cancel-with-fee or /no-show. Confirm dialog text includes Rp fee. Toasts include refund/fee values. Live UI E2E was attempted; login form selector mismatch (placeholder-based input) blocked the playwright click flow, but backend correctness is fully proven and frontend code review matches spec.

issues: WhatsApp link text still says 'H-1' even though backend no longer enforces H-1 (Dashboard.jsx L516). Consider updating message to 'biaya pembatalan 10% dari total' tanpa H-1.

action_items: (Optional, minor) Login input has no type=text — add data-testid='login-username-input' and data-testid='login-password-input' to make automated tests robust.
(Optional) Update WhatsApp confirmation message (Dashboard.jsx L516) — H-1 wording is now obsolete since backend allows cancel anytime with 10% fee.
(Suggested) Add data-testid to <input name=username> in Login.jsx so the testing agent can interact reliably.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py L1234-1266 cancel_with_fee correctly accepts {aktif, booking_pending, booking_paid}; refund=0 if not booking_paid; fee=round(total*0.10); zero-total handled (fee=0). payment_status set to 'refunded' if refund>0 else 'forfeited'. ✓
server.py L1271-1290 mark_no_show strictly requires booking_paid → returns 400 'Hanya booking lunas...' otherwise; status→no_show, payment_status→kept, amount_retained=amount_due. ✓
Dashboard.jsx L501-512 DialogFooter conditionals match spec: aktif→bd-cancel, booking_pending→bd-cancel-pending, booking_paid→bd-cancel-refund + bd-no-show. ✓
Dashboard.jsx L153-167 quickCancelBooking (room-cancel-N X button) calls POST /cancel-with-fee (not DELETE) and shows refund/fee in toast. ✓
Dashboard.jsx L516 WhatsApp message still mentions 'H-1' — inconsistent with new always-allow policy.

success_rate.frontend: code-review only (testid contract verified, live click flow blocked by login selector)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed walk-in bookings, flip status via direct Mongo update where needed (booking_paid simulation), and clean up before+after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend logic for cancel-with-fee (aktif/pending/paid + total=0 + 404 + already-cancelled 400) and no-show (paid OK / pending 400 / aktif 400 / 404) is covered in /app/backend/tests/test_iter17_cancel_noshow.py. For frontend E2E, login inputs are Username (placeholder 'cth: owner', no name/type=text — use input:first-of-type or add data-testid). Mongo override pattern (pymongo direct) inside Playwright env requires subprocess to /app's venv since motor isn't bundled in the browser runner.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Minor wording inconsistency in WhatsApp confirmation only.
